case_title: SUTTER MEDICAL GROUP VS NOBLES BARR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-22-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO AUG-26-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $450.20 FILED BY SUTTER MEDICAL GROUP AS TO DEFENDANT NOBLES BARR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NOBLES BARR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUTTER MEDICAL GROUP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOBLES BARR $450.20 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $450.20 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NOBLES BARR
